name: Lot (France)
description: Red field charged with a white fortified bridge of five towers topped with gold fleurs-de-lis, over blue wavy water along the base.
history: The towered bridge depicts the Pont Valentré of Cahors, the historic capital of the Quercy.

features.role: fortified bridge of towers (Pont Valentre) with gold fleurs-de-lis above
wavy water at base for the river Lot
